fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies a value that is copied from the corresponding field on the production order header.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that is to be produced.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Description field on the item card. If you enter a variant code, the variant description is copied to this field instead.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code, if the produced items should be stored in a specific location.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin that the produced item is posted to as output, and from where it can be taken to storage or cross-docked.

fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a standard task.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity to be produced if you manually fill in this line.

fields.name: Finished Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much of the quantity on this line has been produced.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the finished and planned quantities, or zero if the finished quantity is greater than the remaining quantity.

fields.name: Scrap %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item that you expect to be scrapped in the production process.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the produced item must be available. The date is copied from the header of the production order.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip:
Automatically includes a value when you calculate the production order. The starting date is retrieved from the production order routing.
If you modify the date, the order line will automatically be rescheduled.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip:
Automatically includes a value when you calculate the production order. The starting time is retrieved from the production order routing.
If you modify the time, the order line will automatically be rescheduled.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip:
Automatically includes a value when you calculate the production order. The ending date is retrieved from the production order routing.
If you modify the date, the order line will automatically be rescheduled.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip:
Automatically includes a value when you calculate the production order. The ending time is retrieved from the production order routing.
If you modify the time, the order line will automatically be rescheduled.

fields.name: Planning Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which planning level the item on the planned production order line belongs to. This information is comparable to the Low-Level Code on items, however, this field refers to the planning.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Production BOM No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the production BOM that is the basis for creating the Prod. Order Component list for this line.

fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the routing used as the basis for creating the production order routing for this line.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the inventory posting group to which the Item No. is attached. The program automatically copies this code from the item card when the item number is filled in.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Refers to the routing number that is related to the production order line.
The field contains a zero when the routing line is related to a family order where more production order lines share the same routing.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost on the line by multiplying the unit cost by the quantity.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of this item have been reserved.

fields.name: Capacity Type Filter
fields.tooltip:
Used when calculating production order statistics.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Capacity No. Filter
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Calculates production order statistics.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Calculates production order statistics.

fields.name: Manual Scheduling
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the End/Due Dates on the production have been scheduled manually.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item is measured, such as in pieces or tons. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item card is inserted. It will be changed if you switch Product BOM or Production BOM Version.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity for this entry, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Finished Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the quantity on the production order line, stated in base units of measure, has been produced.
The program automatically updates this field when you post final routing list operations from the output journal.

fields.name: Remaining Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Automatically updates this field when the Finished Quantity field is updated. This field shows the difference (expressed in base units of measure) between the finished quantity and the planned quantity (or 0, if the finished quantity is greater than the remaining quantity).

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reserved quantity of the item, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Expected Operation Cost Amt.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected operation cost amount. When production is in progress or has ended, you can compare this amount to the Actual Capacity Cost in the Production Order Statistics window.

fields.name: Total Exp. Oper. Output (Qty.)
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Expected Component Cost Amt.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected component cost amount. When production is in progress or has ended, you can compare this amount to the Actual Material Cost in the Production Order Statistics window.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's starting date and starting time, which is retrieved from the production order routing.

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's ending date and ending time, which is retrieved from the production order routing.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Cost Amount (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Cost Amount in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Unit Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Unit Cost in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Qty. Put Away
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is put away.

fields.name: Production BOM Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version code of the production BOM.

fields.name: Routing Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the routing.

fields.name: Routing Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how the operations are to be arranged when calculating in a production order.
The available types are:
Serial
Parallel
In the case of the Serial calculation type, the operations are calculated in the production routing according to the value in the Operation No. field of the routing line.
In the Parallel calculation type the operation is calculated in connection with the Next Operation No. field of the routing line.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: If you have filled in the Unit of Measure field on the routing card and entered a quantity for the current item in the Qty. per Unit of Measure field, the program automatically fills in this field when you enter the item number on the line.

fields.name: MPS Order
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the production order line is an MPS order, that is, whether it is linked to a production forecast or a sales order. If so, the program places a check mark in the field.
The user can also enter a check mark in the field when manually editing the line.

fields.name: Planning Flexibility
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the supply represented by this line is considered by the planning system when calculating action messages.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the indirect cost in percent of this production order line.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the overhead rate of this production order line.
You can set up an overhead rate to cover expenses other than material or capacity costs, for example, transport expenses for the production order line.
The Overhead Rate is an absolute amount. Even if the item consists of more than one item, the amount does not depend on the number of items.
